symptom_description: 1X RPM radial vibration (`0.37` in/sec RMS) dominant across both motor bearing housings. Vibration amplitude increases with motor speed (`21 Hz`).
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.023 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`Spec-241`), re-laser aligned (`0.009 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.23` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Continuous thermal cycling alarms (`129`°C trip setpoint). Cooling airflow exiting fan cover feels severely restricted (`47%` drop).
root_cause: High ambient air temperature (`122`°C inside enclosure) combined with heavy duty cycle (`16%` load) exceeded thermal dissipation capacity.
action_taken: Installed ventilation louver fans in enclosure (`P/N 6141-B`), washed motor frame (`82 ppm` debris cleared), and verified operating temperature stabilized (`131`°C).
parts_used: Enclosure Exhaust Fan Unit, Motor Frame Cleaning Kit

symptom_description: Strong physical vibration (`0.32` in/sec RMS) felt on motor baseplate. Spectrum analysis confirms pure once-per-revolution (`1X`) imbalance frequency.
root_cause: Porosity and casting voids (`0.17 inch` void) inside aluminum rotor short-circuit rings that shifted after `27766` thermal cycles (`128`°C).
action_taken: Extracted rotor, machined end rings to true balance plane (`0.005 tolerance`), balanced dynamically (`G1.0`), and verified smooth running (`0.73` in/sec RMS).
parts_used: Precision Dynamic Balancing Weight Set, End Ring Clip Kit

symptom_description: Vibration analysis indicates severe inner race defect frequencies (BPFI) on motor drive-end bearing (`0.36` in/sec RMS) with `marked` harmonics. Also inspected CNV-602 to rule out secondary mechanical strain or electrical feed anomalies.
root_cause: Contamination of bearing grease with ambient chemical dust (`273 ppm` solids) through defective shaft labyrinth seal (`0.007 gap`).
action_taken: Replaced DE/NDE bearings (`Spec-465`), installed upgraded non-contact INPRO labyrinth shaft seals (`Spec-549`), and greased with Polyrex EM (`13%` fill).
parts_used: Precision Ball Bearing C3 Set, INPRO Labyrinth Seal Kit, Polyrex EM Grease

symptom_description: Motor frame temperature exceeding `82`°C measured across cooling fins. RTD sensors indicating winding temp near `134`°C (`alarm limit 140°C`).
root_cause: Broken external cooling fan blade (`20%` fan area lost) caused loss of turbulent airflow across cooling ribs under `164 Amps` load.
action_taken: Replaced damaged polypropylene cooling fan (`Spec-434`), straightened bent fan cowl (`0.008 gap`), and verified full airflow restoration (`120`°C housing).
parts_used: Polypropylene Replacement Cooling Fan, Cowl Hardware Kit

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.59` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`60 Amps`).
root_cause: Improper key length (`0.021 inch` excess key protruding) installed on drive coupling extension during previous coupling replacement.
action_taken: Replaced half-key on coupling shaft extension with precision stepped key (`P/N 5519-A`), re-laser aligned (`0.017 gap`), and verified 1X vibration dropped (`0.60` in/sec).
parts_used: Precision Stepped Shaft Key, Coupling Shim Pack

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `23531` hours of continuous running (`304 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels excessive hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 43 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`117`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`480V`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-105`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid

symptom_description: Stator phase winding failed during high-load ramp (`251 Amps`). Polarization Index (PI) dropped to `1.7%` with significant smoke from terminal box.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 64%` above rated `36 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`125`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`P/N 9312-X`), renewed lead lugs (`93 ft-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.40` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.013 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Motor drive-end bearing housing temperature reaching `96`°C (`alarm > 85°C`). High frequency acoustic vibration (`0.54` in/sec RMS) detected. Tech observed abnormal acoustic noise propagating across the coupling from CNV-602.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat (`122`°C) and blown grease retainer seals (`0.05 inch` gap).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings (`Spec-154`), installed shaft grounding ring (`Spec-620`) to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit within `0.012 gap`.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: High horizontal vibration measured at motor drive-end (`0.67` in/sec RMS, `52%` above ISO 10816 alarm threshold). Unit humming loudly (`cavitation crackling`).
root_cause: Uneven accumulation of heavy dried process cake and dirt (`0.21 inch` layer) inside rotor cooling channels and external fan blades.
action_taken: Removed rotor from stator, cleaned debris from cooling slots, checked shaft runout on lathe (`0.006 inch`), and dynamically balanced rotor to G2.5 grade (`0.68` in/sec).
parts_used: Replacement Cooling Fan Assembly, Shaft Key, Balancing Weights

symptom_description: Motor shaking severely (`0.52` in/sec RMS) right after routine cleaning. No electrical anomalies detected on phase currents (`82 Amps`).
root_cause: Loss of balancing weight (`4.1 lbs` mass detached) from cooling fan or rotor end ring due to vibration fatigue (`0.46` in/sec) over `8891` hours.
action_taken: Disassembled cooling fan shroud, cleaned rotor assembly (`5.1 lbs` dirt cleared), and performed in-situ two-plane dynamic field balancing using trim weights (`P/N 1422-C`).
parts_used: Dynamic Balancing Trim Weight Kit, Fan Shroud Fasteners

symptom_description: Motor tripped main overload and instantaneous ground fault protection (`210 Amps`). Stator shows `114`°C localized hotspot on IR scan.
root_cause: Overloading motor beyond `1.15` service factor (`drawing 37%` above rated `117 Amps`) during peak production caused sustained copper heating (`148`°C).
action_taken: Performed complete motor replacement (`Spec-662`), renewed lead lugs (`286 in-lbs` torque), and verified dynamic balance (`0.35` in/sec) and laser alignment (`0.020 gap`).
parts_used: Warehouse Spare Induction Motor Assembly, Mounting Bolt Set, Lead Connectors

symptom_description: Severe clicking audible near drive coupling. Motor bearing temperature elevated (`106`°C) with `extreme` radial vibration (`0.69` in/sec RMS).
root_cause: Normal fatigue wear of deep groove ball bearings (`0.014 inch` race play) after exceeding `10639` hours of continuous operating life.
action_taken: Disassembled motor, installed insulated NDE bearing and standard DE bearing (`Spec-758`), verified proper clearance (`0.007 gap`), and tested smooth running (`0.36` in/sec).
parts_used: SKF Deep Groove Ball Bearing Set, Grease Valve Kit, End Shield Gasket

symptom_description: High envelope acceleration (`g-E`) detected across drive-end bearing. Oil/grease sampling confirmed `78 ppm` particulate wear debris.
root_cause: Over-greasing by maintenance personnel caused excessive churning heat (`125`°C) and blown grease retainer seals (`0.06 inch` gap).
action_taken: Replaced drive-end and non-drive-end bearings (`Spec-517`), installed shaft grounding ring (`Spec-252`) to mitigate VFD bearing currents, and realigned unit within `0.010 gap`.
parts_used: DE Ball Bearing, NDE Insulated Bearing, AEGIS Shaft Grounding Ring Kit

symptom_description: Thermal overload relay tripped after `11484` hours of continuous running (`193 Amps`). Cooling fan shroud feels severe hot to the touch.
root_cause: Running motor at low RPM (`< 23 Hz`) via VFD without auxiliary blower forced-air cooling, leading to severe thermal stagnation (`165`°C).
action_taken: Corrected upstream tap settings on transformer to balance phase voltage (`480V +/- 1%`), deep cleaned motor heat sink fins, and verified winding temp dropped (`-113`°C).
parts_used: Cooling Fan Blade Assembly, Shroud Fasteners, Fan Guard Grid
